_comment: Copy this to config/config.json and edit. The /setup skill writes this for you.
_google_sheet_note: Only used when backend=google_sheets. The ID is the long string in the sheet URL.
_applications_dir_note: Where generated resume/cover-letter/answers land, one folder per job.
_model_note: Model for the headless generation passes. sonnet is the cost-sane default.
_finder_schedule_note: Cron expression for the job-finder. Default: every 4 hours at :17.
_apply_schedule_note: Cron for the resume/cover-letter generator. Default: 9:07, 14:07, 19:07.
_web_shard_note: Non-ATS companies are checked 1/N per run to spread load. Raise N if you add many companies.
_google_token_note: Only used when backend=google_sheets. JSON file holding an OAuth refresh token plus client_id and client_secret. See docs/SETUP.md. Leave as the default unless you store it elsewhere.

filters._note: Hard filters applied in scripts/poll.py and re-applied in the generation prompts. Set any value to null to disable that filter.
filters._us_only_note: true drops postings whose location is clearly foreign with no US option. Set false for a global search.
filters._experience_ceiling_note: Drop a posting if its JD demands at least this many years in your field. null disables.
filters._experience_ceiling_field_note: Word that must appear near the years requirement for the ceiling to fire (e.g. 'product', 'engineering').
filters._secondary_note: Optional second years/field rule, e.g. 5+ yrs SaaS. Set either key null to disable.
filters._salary_floor_note: Drop a posting if it states a salary whose top figure is below this. Postings with no salary are kept. null disables.
filters._company_location_rules_note: Per-company overrides. A posting from a listed company is dropped unless its location contains one of allow_only (case-insensitive substring). Empty list disables.
